location.p:
Cambridge occupies a unique position in the UK executive talent market, anchored by the University of Cambridge and its research commercialisation ecosystem, and the extraordinary concentration of life sciences, technology, and deep technology businesses in the Cambridge Cluster — often described as the most productive innovation ecosystem in Europe outside of London. Executive search in Cambridge is therefore highly specialised, dominated by senior appointments in pharmaceutical, biotech, medtech, software, and semiconductor businesses.

The Cambridge executive market is global in orientation. Many of the most senior roles in Cambridge cluster companies draw on international candidate pools — the best Chief Scientific Officers, VP R&D, and CTO candidates for a Cambridge biotech may be based in Boston, Basel, or Berlin. Search firms operating effectively in Cambridge must combine local market knowledge with genuine international reach and the scientific credibility to assess technical leadership roles with authority.
location.roles: CSO, CTO, VP R&D, CEO, CFO, Head of Regulatory Affairs, VP Clinical Development, Commercial Director, Head of Business Development, Chief Medical Officer
